title: CU-MATE 20 Inch Grey Ragdoll Cat Stuffed Toy Dolls Cute Handmade Plush Toy Ann Baker Cat Birthday Gift for Boys Girls
features: REALISTIC AND CUTE - kawaii plushies toy- stuffed animal grey Ragdoll cat is not only a plush toy, but also a handicraft, fur, eyes, nose, mouth and so on, every link is handmade, very realistic.

SAFETY MATERIAL: International brand CU-MATE, Ragdoll cat plush animals do not shed hair, the fur is made of safe material acrylic fiber, and the filler is polyester fiber, which strictly implements international safety standards and will not cause any harm to children and adults.

Emotional Companion: With a cute and very realistic look, this toy can accompany you or your friends during lonely times. When you pet the plush toy dog, all the bad emotions and work stress will go away.

FESTIVE GIFTS: Surprise gifts stuffed animals for girlfriends, little boys, girls on holidays like Christmas, Easter, Carnival, Years, Valentine's Day, Children's Day, and encourage imaginative play and unique home decor.

Maintenance and Cleaning: Due to long-distance shipping, cat hair will be somewhat messy upon receipt. You can shake the cat's hair first, then use a small comb to comb the cat's hair neatly. If there is dust, you can gently wipe it with water, and then dry it with a hair dryer to restore it to its original state. And it is recommended to pet the puppet cat more, the cat's hair will be softer and smoother.
description: CU-MATE focusing on high-end simulated animal toys. Independent research and development, production, s, and provide OEM support for many international brands. It has brand and patent protection in many countries around the world.
